text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...So, what do you think of the Ship of Theseus?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come on, Trainer, you know... the paradox.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If, at the end of my research, there was a
discovery that reconstructs everything...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The structure formed after undergoing all its
changes... how much of it could still be
considered an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That has been the question... spinning around in
my head recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon stares off into space.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is our nonstop racing beginning to take a toll? I
should probably rethink her race schedule.
